# Agile IT - CMMC Compliance Consultant | Get Expert Consulting Services

> As a CMMC compliance consultant, Agile IT offers expert CMMC consulting services to ensure your business meets standards.

The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) is an assessment framework and assessor certification program designed to increase the trust in measures of compliance to a variety of standards.
The purpose of the CMMC is to verify that the information systems used by the contractors of the United States Department of Defense to process, transmit or store sensitive data are compliant with the mandatory information security requirements.
The goal is to ensure appropriate protection of controlled unclassified information (CUI) and federal contract information (FCI) that is stored and processed by partner or vendor.

CMMC requirements are complex, confusing, and challenging. Data security should not be a roadblock in organizational success but the key to your organization thriving. We can help with that and more!

Typical Pain Points We Eliminate:
- Uncertainty about where to start your compliance journey
- Unknown gaps in security controls
- Confusion over what information is CUI and what is not
- Inability to close the gaps in technology (POA&M)
- Current technology staff lacks the advanced requisite knowledge

We divide our solutions in 3 phases:
1. AgileSecure: Deployment & migration services with flexible licensing options. 100% focused on Microsoft Cloud, our expertise delivers unparalleled insights and solutions tailored to your needs.
2. AgileDefend: Managed Cloud services tailored to address your unique business, ensure you stay ahead of evolving threats and regulatory requirements.
3. AgileThrive: With your success as our priority, our proven framework will help retain your existing DoD contracts, secure new bids, and enhance your ability to thrive.

Contact us to secure your organization's future.


## AgileSecure: Deployments & Migrations Solutions

- [Mergers and Acquisitions](https://agileit.com/services/it-integration-in-mergers-and-acquisitions/): Optimized Integration
Strategies for M&A. Simplify the complex process of IT integration during mergers and acquisitions with our comprehensive approach, ensuring streamlined consolidation, enhanced efficiency, and optimal performance.
- [Azure Government - Migration & Modernization](https://agileit.com/services/azure-migrations/): Experience customized Microsoft Azure migrations tailored to accelerate your business growth and maximize operational efficiency.
- [Migrating to Microsoft 365](https://agileit.com/services/microsoft-office-365-cloud-migration/): Migrating your business to Microsoft 365 is often the biggest and broadest investment your organization has made. Reduce risk, uncertainty of obstacles, and frustrated users by working with a team of experts.
- [Migrating to SharePoint Online](https://agileit.com/services/sharepoint-migrations/): Migrating to SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, and other Microsoft productivity tools to achieve business results in security, compliance, and user productivity.

## AgileDefend: Managed Services and Advisory

- [Managed Services](https://agileit.com/agiledefend-cloud-managed-services-and-security-provider/): Comprehensive management of IT services to ensure compliance and security are maintained effectively.
- [Advisory Services](https://agileit.com/agileadvisor-expert-it-consulting/): Expert guidance on compliance and cybersecurity strategies tailored to your organization's needs.
- [FedRAMP Compliant Backup](https://agileit.com/services/fedramp-compliant-backup/): Cloud Backup for Microsoft 365 and Azure. With our data management expertise, we will help you assess, remediate, and set a strong foundation for information management.

## AgileThrive: CMMC Compliance Services

- [CMMC](https://agileit.com/agilethrive-cmmc-compliance-services/): Agile IT provides comprehensive consulting services to help organizations achieve CMMC compliance, ensuring they meet the necessary cybersecurity standards for federal contracts.
- [CMMC Enclave](https://agileit.com/services/cmmc-enclave/): A dedicated environment designed to support organizations in achieving and maintaining CMMC compliance, providing the necessary security measures and infrastructure.

## Resources and Guides

- [CMMC Glossary](https://agileit.com/cmmc-glossary/): A glossary of key terms related to CMMC and NIST 800-171, providing clear definitions to help contractors understand compliance language.
- [NIST 800-171 Guide](https://agileit.com/nist-800-171-guide/): An in-depth resource detailing the control families and licensing recommendations necessary for compliance with NIST 800-171.
- [GCC High Guide](https://agileit.com/gcc-high-guide/): Government Requirements & Microsoft 365 GCC High Solutions. Tailored solutions for government contractors to meet stringent security and compliance requirements, including DFARS and ITAR.
- [Case Studies](https://agileit.com/case-studies/): Explore real-world examples of how Agile IT has successfully addressed compliance challenges for various organizations.
- [Whitepapers](https://agileit.com/whitepaper/): Access in-depth analyses and insights on industry trends and compliance strategies.
